zh.lifeSummary: 當Mariano II de Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres於大約1182年出生在義大利薩德尼亞薩薩里時，他的父親Comita III de Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres56歲，母親Spella25歲。他和Agnese di Massa di Cagliari至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1232年在他的家鄉享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mariano II de Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres于大约1182年出生在意大利薩德尼亞薩薩里时，他的父亲Comita III de Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres56岁，母亲Spella25岁。他和Agnese di Massa di Cagliari至少有1个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1232年在他的家乡享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mariano
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Pablo, Alfonso, Ernesto, Fernando, Gregorio, Jesus, Luz, Manuel, Marcelo, Rolando.  Italian Antonio, Angelo, Rocco, Vito, Nicola, Fausto, Federico, Mabini, Romeo, Alessandra, Arcangelo, Caesar.

Italian and Spanish: from the personal name Mariano, from the Latin surname Marianus (a derivative of the old personal name Marius, of Etruscan origin). In the early Christian era it came to be taken as an adjective derived from Maria, and was associated with the cult of the Virgin Mary. It was borne by various early Christian saints, including a 3rd-century martyr in Numibia and a 5th-century hermit of Berry, France.

variants.name: Marjanovic
meanings: Serbian and Croatian (Marjanović): patronymic from the personal name Marjan, Latin Marianus (see Mariano ).

variants.name: Mariana
meanings: Extended spelling of Marian , reinforcing the association of the second element with Ann(e) . It also represents a French assimilated form of Mariamne . Marianne is the name used for the symbolic figure of the French Republic.

variants.name: Marian
meanings: Originally a medieval variant spelling of   Marion .  However, in the 18th century, when combined names began to come into fashion, it was sometimes understood as a combination of   Mary   and   Ann .

variants.name: Mariani
meanings: Originally a medieval variant spelling of   Marion .  However, in the 18th century, when combined names began to come into fashion, it was sometimes understood as a combination of   Mary   and   Ann .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Mariano II de Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres was born about 1182, in Sassari, Sardinia, Italy, his father, Comita III de Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres, was 56 and his mother, Spella, was 25. He had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Agnese di Massa di Cagliari. He died in 1232, in his hometown, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mariano II de Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres est né environ 1182, à Sassari, Sardegna, Italie, son père, Comita III de Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Spella, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Agnese di Massa di Cagliari. Il est décédé en 1232, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mariano II de Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres um 1182 in Sassari, Sardinien, Italien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Comita III de Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres 56 und seine Mutter Spella 25. Er hatte mit Agnese di Massa di Cagliari mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1232 im Alter von 51 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mariano II de Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres è nato il circa 1182 nel Sassari, Sardegna, Italia, il suo padre, Comita III de Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres, aveva 56 anni e il suo madre, Spella, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con Agnese di Massa di Cagliari. Morì nel 1232, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mariano II de Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torresが約1182年にイタリアサルデグナサッサリで生まれた時，父Comita III de Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torresは56歳，母Spellaは25歳であった。彼はAgnese di Massa di Cagliariとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1232年に故郷で51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mariano II de Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres(이)가 대략 1182년 이탈리아 사르데그나 사사리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Comita III de Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres(은)는 56세였고, 그의 어머니 Spella(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Agnese di Massa di Cagliari(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1232년 그의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mariano II de Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres nasceu aproximadamente 1182, em Sassari, Sardegna, Itália, seu pai, Comita III de Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres, tinha 56 anos e sua mãe, Spella, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas com Agnese di Massa di Cagliari. Ele faleceu em 1232, em sua cidade natal, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mariano II de Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres родился около 1182 г. в местности сассари, сардегна, Италия, его отцу по имени Comita III de Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Spella, 25. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Agnese di Massa di Cagliari. Он умер в 1232 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 51 год.

sm.from 1218 to 1232: mai le 1218 e o'o I le 1232

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mariano II de Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres nació aproximadamente 1182, en Sassari, Sardegna, Italia, su papá, Comita III de Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres, tenía 56 años y su mamá, Spella, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas con Agnese di Massa di Cagliari. Murió en 1232, en su pueblo, a la edad de 51 años.
